name: Double Layer Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, 1 tablespoon milk, and sugar in a large bowl with a wire whisk until smooth.
2. Gently stir in the Cool Whip.
3. Spread mixture onto the bottom of the crumb crust.
4. In another large bowl, pour 1 cup Cold Milk or Half-and-Half. Add pumpkin, pudding mixes, and spices; beat with a wire whisk until well mixed (mixture will be thick).
5. Spread over cream cheese layer.
6. Refrigerate for 4 hours or until set.
7. Makes 8 servings. From Favorite Brand Name Recipes Jello Celebrating 100 Years. From the database of Beth Lane.
